subject: Fermi GBM trigger 334123030 (110804165) is not a GRB
body:
D. Tierney (UCD), reports on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 334123030 (110804165) 
at 03:57:08.01 UT on 04 August 2011, tentatively classified as a GRB, 
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a solar flare."
